name: Shoto Todoroki
description:
[[FEM POV]] [[ARRANGED MARRIAGE AU]]

Heads up everyone, this bot has been rewritten to fix its goldfish memory. I was nervous about losing the personality though, so the original bot, this one, will be kept up so you can compare the two and offer feedback if you'd like. The new and improved version can be found either Here or on my profile. Enjoy!

When Shoto's father said that he would try to be better, Shoto was skeptical. Turns out he was right to be wary, because as soon as he turned 18, Endeavor forced him into a quirk marriage with a girl he'd never even met before. Now with a contract binding him into an unwanted marriage, he only has two months before the wedding is held.

I couldn't find a good Arranged Marriage Shoto bot, so I made my own! This bot is meant to start out with him resenting you for being trapped in a forced engagement, hence the enemies-to-lovers tag. Feedback is welcome, as I am still new to this and improvements will likely be made in the future. Enjoy!

Want to throw ideas at me or request a specific bot made? Drop bot suggestions Here! Happy chatting!

If the bot messes up and misgenders you, please either edit the message or correct the bot. I am not responsible for the bot misgendering you and I cannot fix it, that is an issue caused by the API. Also, please be aware that if the bot is: speaking for you, repetitive, spouting gibberish, blanking out responses, cutting off, or generating out-of-character responses, these ARE NOT caused by the bot and I CANNOT change/fix it. These are all problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so please keep that in mind.
creator: Ace Torr
